introSection: Speedway, originally known as Over the Top, was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Summit Beach Park in Akron, Ohio, USA.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: Four riders were killed and 11 were injured on July 7, 1918 when the ride derailed after a board was left on the track. The manufacturer agreed to pay $1,500 to the estates of the four people who had been killed.

fullText:
Speedway, originally known as Over the Top, was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Summit Beach Park in Akron, Ohio, USA.

Four riders were killed and 11 were injured on July 7, 1918 when the ride derailed after a board was left on the track. The manufacturer agreed to pay $1,500 to the estates of the four people who had been killed.
